goal: Request a same-day appointment for an acute ankle injury

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, yes, I rolled my ankle pretty badly about an hour ago on a curb and it's pretty swollen — I'm hoping you might be able to fit me in today to get it looked at.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thanks for calling PivotPoint Orthopaedics.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh good, yes — I was hoping to get seen today if at all possible, it's swollen and I'm having trouble putting weight on it.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, this is Tom Bradley — I'm calling because I hurt my ankle and was hoping to get an appointment today.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Sure, it's August 19th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I understand. Can you tell me your date of birth?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: It's August 19th, 1972 — August 19, 1972.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Please provide your full name and date of birth.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Tom Bradley, August 19th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you. Can you please confirm your full name first and last?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Tom Bradley — T-O-M, Bradley, B-R-A-D-L-E-Y.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Just to confirm,

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, that's right — Tom Bradley.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Would you like

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, I'd like to be seen today if possible — would you have any appointments available?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I have

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Great, what do you have available?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I can't proceed further right now.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, okay — if you can't get me in today, should I go to urgent care or get an X-ray somewhere first?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Sure, I'll hold, thank you.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh — okay, I think I may have reached the wrong number. I'll try calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics back directly.
